title: Internal vs Components 分類三 test
mechanism: 63 component dirs + 7 pattern dirs 全列。internal 標記全集 grep(frontmatter `internal: true` / `- isInternal`)= 10 單元(Command / DateGrid / HoverCard / MenuItem / Notice / OverflowIndicator / SelectionItem / SelectMenu / horizontal-overflow / overlay-surface);三向一致性 cross-check:frontmatter ↔ storybook title `Design System/Internal[ Patterns]/`(26 個 stories 檔全對齊,無單向漏標)↔ root barrel 排除(`node scripts/gen-design-system-barrel.mjs --check` 綠:10 排除 front-door、@internal marker 10/10)。`components/Internal/` folder 無住戶(與 ui-development.md 主路徑宣告一致)。公開組合 primitive(FieldControlGroup / ResizeHandle / ChromeHeader / ItemIcon / ItemAvatar)與 compound-API(Dialog / Field 家族)依 2026-06-06 intent-based SSOT 豁免,無誤標。DateGrid 雖有 standalone 用例但 isInternal 為刻意判定(internal ≠ 禁用,subpath 包裝可用)→ 非 finding。
verdict: 0 material + 1 marginal after 全掃 70 element folders

findings.問題: 「現行 11 個 internal 單元全走 frontmatter」stale count — 實際 10 個(grep 全集 + gen-design-system-barrel --check 輸出「internal subpath-only:10」雙重機械證實)
findings.建議: 改「10 個」或改為不 hardcode 數字(指向 barrel --check 輸出為準,對齊 SSOT auto-sync invariant 禁 hardcode 跨檔數字)
